title: HTTP API client for mermaid-collab server communication with type-safe wrappers
purpose: Provides a type-safe interface for communicating with the mermaid-collab server, handling session, diagram, document, and metadata operations with proper error handling.
module_context: Exports an APIClient class and a singleton instance. The class provides methods for session management, diagram CRUD operations, document operations, validation, rendering, and metadata management. Includes error handling for network issues and HTTP errors.

methods.name: request
methods.normalized_params: (method: string, path: string, options?: { body?: unknown; query?: Record<string, string>; }): Promise<T>

steps.content: Construct the full URL including any query parameters.
Set up fetch options with appropriate headers and body.
Make the HTTP request using fetch.
IF the network request fails, throw a network error.
Parse the JSON response from the server.
IF the response is not OK, throw an API error with status and data.
Return the parsed JSON data.

methods.name: getSessions
methods.normalized_params: (): Promise<Session[]>

steps.content: Make a GET request to the sessions endpoint.
Extract and return the list of sessions from the response.

methods.name: createSession
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string): Promise<Session>

steps.content: Make a POST request to create a new session with project and session identifiers.
Return a new session object with the provided project and session identifiers and current timestamp.

methods.name: deleteSession
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string): Promise<boolean>

steps.content: Make a DELETE request to remove the specified session.
Return the success status from the response.

methods.name: getDiagram
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<Diagram>

steps.content: Make a GET request to retrieve the specified diagram.
Return the diagram data from the response.

methods.name: listDiagrams
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string): Promise<DiagramListItem[]>

steps.content: Make a GET request to list all diagrams in the session.
Extract and return the list of diagram items from the response.

methods.name: createDiagram
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, name: string, content: string): Promise<string>

steps.content: Make a POST request to create a new diagram with the provided name and content.
Return the ID of the newly created diagram from the response.

methods.name: updateDiagram
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, content: string): Promise<void>

steps.content: Make a POST request to update the specified diagram with new content.
Return nothing upon successful update.

methods.name: patchDiagram
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, oldString: string, newString: string): Promise<void>

steps.content: Make a POST request to patch the specified diagram with search-replace content.
Return nothing upon successful patch.

methods.name: deleteDiagram
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<void>

steps.content: Make a DELETE request to remove the specified diagram.
Return nothing upon successful deletion.

methods.name: getDocument
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<Document>

steps.content: Make a GET request to retrieve the specified document.
Return the document data from the response.

methods.name: getDocumentClean
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<string>

steps.content: Make a GET request to retrieve clean content of the specified document.
Return the clean content from the response.

methods.name: listDocuments
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string): Promise<DocumentListItem[]>

steps.content: Make a GET request to list all documents in the session.
Extract and return the list of document items from the response.

methods.name: createDocument
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, name: string, content: string): Promise<string>

steps.content: Make a POST request to create a new document with the provided name and content.
Return the ID of the newly created document from the response.

methods.name: updateDocument
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, content: string): Promise<void>

steps.content: Make a POST request to update the specified document with new content.
Return nothing upon successful update.

methods.name: patchDocument
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, oldString: string, newString: string): Promise<void>

steps.content: Make a POST request to patch the specified document with search-replace content.
Return nothing upon successful patch.

methods.name: deleteDocument
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<void>

steps.content: Make a DELETE request to remove the specified document.
Return nothing upon successful deletion.

methods.name: validateDiagram
methods.normalized_params: (content: string): Promise<ValidationResult>

steps.content: Make a POST request to validate the provided Mermaid diagram content.
Return the validation result from the response.

methods.name: renderDiagramSVG
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, theme?: string): Promise<string>

steps.content: Make a GET request to render the specified diagram as SVG.
IF the response is not OK, throw an error with status and data.
Return the SVG content from the response.

methods.name: getDiagramThumbnail
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<string>

steps.content: Make a GET request to retrieve the thumbnail for the specified diagram.
IF the response is not OK, throw an error with status and data.
Return the thumbnail content from the response.

methods.name: transpileDiagram
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string): Promise<string>

steps.content: Make a GET request to transpile the specified diagram to Mermaid format.
Return the transpiled Mermaid content from the response.

methods.name: getMetadata
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string): Promise<any>

steps.content: Make a GET request to retrieve metadata for the specified session.
Return the metadata from the response.

methods.name: updateItemMetadata
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, id: string, updates: { folder?: string | null; locked?: boolean; deprecated?: boolean; pinned?: boolean }): Promise<void>

steps.content: Make a POST request to update metadata for the specified item.
Return nothing upon successful update.

methods.name: manageFolders
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, session: string, action: 'create' | 'rename' | 'delete', name: string, newName?: string): Promise<{ success: boolean; folders: string[] }>

steps.content: Make a POST request to manage folders with the specified action.
Return the success status and updated folder list from the response.
